creator: karl@denninger.net
text:
(In reply to Hans Petter Selasky from comment #4)

It comes back up on its own.  If you're asking if it stops flapping, the answer is no; a few minutes to an hour later it will do it again.

As is evident from the logs it is inconsistent yet very common...

Nov 22 08:39:18 IpGw kernel: ue0: link state changed to UP
